_comment: Copy this to credentials.json and fill in. credentials.json is gitignored.
_tripit_note: After first run, fetch_tripit.py also stores access_token + access_token_secret here.
_aerodatabox_note: OPTIONAL. Free tier: 600 req/month, ~last 365 days only. Get one at https://rapidapi.com/aedbx-aedbx/api/aerodatabox — used by tools/enrich_aerodatabox.py to fill in tail numbers, aircraft models, and ATC callsigns.
